code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur: Int = 0
  mut has: Bool = false
  mut neg: Bool = false
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i: Int = 0
  while i < n + 1
    mut b: Int = 32
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        if neg
          nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
        else
          nums = list.push(nums, cur)
        end
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let m = nums.len()
  mut prefix: List<Int> = []
  mut sum: Int = 0
  mut j: Int = 0
  while j < m
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + v
    prefix = list.push(prefix, sum)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out: String = ""
  mut k: Int = 0
  while k < m
    let pv = match prefix.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{pv}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{pv}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
